Changed_Other.purpose: Ensures players benefit from the latest updates and features in the game.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Modifies how dynamic strings handle timestamps for display purposes.
Changed_Other.purpose: Ensures that time-related information is presented more accurately and dynamically to players.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Stores a fast string representation of the Git hash for version control.
Changed_Other.purpose: Improves the speed of loading game updates by quickly identifying the current version.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlipTimeStampFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Optimizes string handling by using a faster timestamp format.
Changed_Other.purpose: Improves performance and speed of string operations in games.

Removed_Other.purpose: Enhances the user interface for players, making it more intuitive and user-friendly.
